name: w300_daemon
description: First-party FERAL HUP v1.1 daemon for W300-class smart glasses. Streams JPEG video frames over HUP v1.1 video_frame (§5.4.2) and optional microphone audio over audio_frame (§5.4.1). Drives the glasses' tap-to-capture / nod gestures back to the brain as device_event. Also accepts hup_action_request for display actuators when present.
